announcements.title: 📢 Voting Reminder
announcements.body: **Voting closes today at 5:00 PM**. Make sure you submit your response before the deadline!

announcements.title: ✅ Confirmation Required
announcements.body: Please _double-check_ your name, class, and admission number before submitting the vote.

announcements.title: ⚠️ Duplicate Submissions
announcements.body: Each member is allowed **only one** vote. Submitting more than once will lead to disqualification.

announcements.title: 🎉 Thank You!
announcements.body: Thanks to all who have voted! Your participation helps shape the future of the club.

announcements.title: 🛠️ Voting Issue Fixed
announcements.body: An earlier bug affecting registration numbers has been **resolved**. You may vote now.

announcements.title: 📌 Attendance Notice
announcements.body:
Voting will also mark **your attendance** for this event.
Make sure your details are correct.

announcements.title: 📝 Edit Requests
announcements.body: If your information is incorrect, use the _Edit Request_ feature from the voting page **before voting**.

announcements.title: 🚨 Link Sharing Alert
announcements.body: **Do NOT share the voting link**. Your submission is linked to your ID and is fully traceable.

announcements.title: 📅 Voting Schedule
announcements.body:
- Voting Opens: **July 2, 10:00 AM**
- Voting Closes: **July 6, 5:00 PM**
- Results: **July 7, via email**

announcements.title: 🔒 Security Notice
announcements.body: The voting platform uses secure authentication. Any misuse will be reported to the club faculty.
